subcodes.first_line: O tested believer, consider how His Holiness 'Alí-Akbar sacrificed his life in the land of Taff [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن ممتحن ملاحظه فرما که حضرت علی اکبر در ارض طف چگونه جانفشانی نمود آن
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment
